# AGENTS.md — GitHub Toggle All Details

## Project Overview

Browser extension to toggle all collapsible details elements in GitHub PR and issue comments.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/github-toggle-all-details](https://github.com/GeiserX/github-toggle-all-details)
- **Language:** JavaScript
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
